sentences.arabic: يَبْدَأُ الْمُوَظَّفُونَ عَمَلَهُمْ فِي السَّاعَةِ الثَّامِنَةِ صَبَاحًا.
sentences.translation: Zaposlenici počinju svoj posao u osam sati ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: The employees start their work at eight in the morning.

sentences.arabic: يُنَظِّمُ كُلُّ وَاحِدٍ مِنْهُمْ مَهَامَهُ الْيَوْمِيَّةَ عَلَى الْحَاسُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Svako od njih organizuje svoje dnevne zadatke na računaru.
sentences.translationEn: Each one of them organizes their daily tasks on the computer.

sentences.arabic: التَّرْكِيزُ الْجَيِّدُ يُسَاعِدُ عَلَى إِنْجَازِ الْأَعْمَالِ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Dobra koncentracija pomaže u brzom završavanju poslova.
sentences.translationEn: Good focus helps in completing the work quickly.
